source_pr.title: session: make unit test TestOptimisticConflicts more stable
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Fix https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/12410

### What is changed and how it works?

A simplified order looks like this:

```
begin pessimistic
wait for a long time
truncate table
```

The DDL operation needs to commit the transaction first.
This commit operation failed because of the pessimistic lock has gone.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - No code

Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

evidence: diff uses unique keys like kv.Key("x_key_TestSkipLargeTxnLock") to avoid interference in tests (store/tikv/snapshot_test.go).
